reason:
Agent attempted to use GitHub tool but failed to retrieve GitHub username due to OAuth token authentication error
  Bugs found:
    - Agent response does not contain a GitHub username - instead returns error: "Failed to fetch access token" when calling api.github.com/user, indicating the connected GitHub account's OAuth token needs to be refreshed/reauthorized
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — page loaded successfully with agents visible in sidebar
Clicked agent "QA-20260505-211615-u8vy" in sidebar — agent detail page opened
Verified agent status — agent status was "idle" as expected
Typed and sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — message submitted to agent
Account access card appeared — selected GitHub account and clicked "Allow Access (1)" button
Multiple API request review dialogs appeared — approved 3 GitHub API calls by clicking "Allow Once" each time
Agent completed processing after 1 minute 6 seconds — response was error message about failed OAuth token instead of GitHub username
bugs: Agent response does not contain a GitHub username - instead returns error: "Failed to fetch access token" when calling api.github.com/user, indicating the connected GitHub account's OAuth token needs to be refreshed/reauthorized
